---
title: "Getting Started with ImageArtR"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Getting Started with ImageArtR}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse = TRUE, comment = "#>", eval = FALSE)
```

ImageArtR converts ordinary images into artistic graphics while keeping a
consistent object structure.

```{r}
library(ImageArtR)

img <- read_art_image(system.file("extdata", "example.png", package = "ImageArtR"))
mosaic <- image_mosaic_art(img, tile_size = 12)
plot(mosaic)
save_image_art(mosaic, "mosaic.png")
```
